title: Did The Great Floods ACTUALLY Happen?
summary: This interview discusses the historical evidence for great floods, examining how flood narratives appear across approximately 2,000 traditions worldwide and how paleohydrology may confirm catastrophic flooding events at the end of the last ice age.

key_claims.claim: There are approximately 2,000 flood traditions found around the world documenting a global phenomenon
Paleohydrology confirms the reality of inconceivably gigantic floods that occurred at the end of the last ice age
There may be a missing important chapter of human history that mainstream narratives have overlooked
